name: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month tool
description: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, inefficient conversion of timesheets causes late payroll submissions. We automate the transformation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations.
target_audience: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of timesheets to payroll reports
